# Stash or Trash

> Swipe-based Android app to clean up your phone's photo gallery. Free, no ads, no cloud.

## What it does

Stash or Trash helps you declutter your photo gallery fast. Swipe right to keep a photo, swipe left to delete it. The Smart Scanner automatically finds junk photos — duplicates, blurry shots, too-dark images, and old screenshots — so you don't have to scroll through thousands of photos manually.

## Key features

- Swipe left to trash, swipe right to stash (keep)
- Smart Scanner detects duplicates, blurry photos, dark photos, and screenshots
- See exactly how much storage you'll recover before confirming
- Undo support — nothing is permanently deleted until you confirm
- 100% on-device processing, no cloud, no accounts, no tracking
- Free with no ads

## Privacy

No data collection whatsoever. All photo analysis happens on-device. No accounts, no sign-up, no analytics, no third-party services. Works completely offline.

## Links

- Website: https://stashortrash.com
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=YOUR_APP_ID
- Privacy Policy: https://stashortrash.com/privacy
